texto: It may not be an easy thing to live in sweet fellowship with all those with whom we come in contact
autor: but that is what the grace of God is given to us for.
explicacao: Citação de but that is what the grace of God is given to us for. sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “It may not be an easy thing to live in sweet fellowship with all those with whom we come in contact” articula reflexao, dwight-l-moody, thing em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
